Package org.key_project.util.java

Class XMLUtil

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.java.XMLUtil
public final class XMLUtil extends Object
Provides static methods to work with XML.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    XMLUtil.HTMLRendererReplacer
    This XMLUtil.ITagReplacer can be used to render HTML into a plain text.
    static interface 
    XMLUtil.ITagReplacer
    Instances of this interface are used in replaceTags(String, ITagReplacer) to replace an individual found tag.

    Description

    ATTRIBUTE_ENCODING
    Attribute name to store encodings.

    Description

    encodeText(String text)
    Encodes the given text in a way that it contains no XML elements and can be used for instance as plain text or attribute value.

    isEntityNameCharacter(char character)
    Checks if the given character is valid to be used in entity names (between &...;).

    Removes all tags from the given text.
    static String
    replaceTags(String text, XMLUtil.ITagReplacer replacer)
    Replaces all tags in the given text with help of the given XMLUtil.ITagReplacer.

  • Method Details

    • replaceTags

      public static String replaceTags(String text, XMLUtil.ITagReplacer replacer)
      Replaces all tags in the given text with help of the given XMLUtil.ITagReplacer.
      Parameters:
      text - The text to execute replacements on.
      replacer - The XMLUtil.ITagReplacer to use.
      Returns:
      The new created text.

    • removeTags

      public static String removeTags(String text)
      Removes all tags from the given text.
      Parameters:
      text - The text to remove tags from.
      Returns:
      The text without tags.

    • encodeText

      public static String encodeText(String text)

      Encodes the given text in a way that it contains no XML elements and can be used for instance as plain text or attribute value.

      The following signs are replaced: 

       
 " => &quot;
 & => &amp;
 ' => &apos;
 < => &lt;
 > => &gt;

      Parameters:
      text - The text to encode.
      Returns:
      The encoded text.

    • isEntityNameCharacter

      public static boolean isEntityNameCharacter(char character)
      Checks if the given character is valid to be used in entity names (between &...;).
      Parameters:
      character - The character to check.
      Returns:
      true is valid, false is not valid.

    • appendEmptyTag

      public static void appendEmptyTag(int level, String tagName, Map<String,String> attributeValues, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends an empty tag to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level.
      tagName - The tag name.
      attributeValues - The attributes.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendStartTag

      public static void appendStartTag(int level, String tagName, Map<String,String> attributeValues, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends a start tag to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level.
      tagName - The tag name.
      attributeValues - The attributes.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendEndTag

      public static void appendEndTag(int level, String tagName, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends an end tag to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level.
      tagName - The tag name.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendWhiteSpace

      public static void appendWhiteSpace(int level, StringBuilder sb)
      Adds leading white space to the StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level in the tree used for leading white space (formatting).
      sb - The StringBuilder to write to.

    • appendAttribute

      public static void appendAttribute(String attributeName, String value, StringBuilder sb)
      Adds an XML attribute to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      attributeName - The attribute name.
      value - The attribute value.
      sb - The StringBuilder to write to.

    • appendXmlHeader

      public static void appendXmlHeader(String encoding, StringBuilder sb)
      Adds an XML header to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      sb - The StringBuilder to write to.

    • appendNewLine

      public static void appendNewLine(StringBuilder sb)
      Adds a line break to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      sb - The StringBuilder to write to.
